calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-19-2024 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment prove-up hearing against Defendant Runway Operations LLC.

Dept. 505; Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:02:11 p.m. and concluding at 2:09:39 p.m.(D505)

Matthew Tom, Esq., specially appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Ziff Davis, LLC via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Runway Operations LLC not appearing.
Brittany Curtis, Esq. co-counsel for the Plaintiff Ziff Davis, LLC via Zoom Video Conference.
Witness for the Plaintiff, Daniel Cleary was placed under oath.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract filed March 29, 2023.
Proof of Personal service as to Defendant served on March 31, 2023.
Dismissal filed as to Defendant Does 1-10 on July 5, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Runway Operations LLC on May 8, 2023.
Notice of the Prove-up hearing filed August 15, 2023.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents outline and summary of the case.

The Court addresses the witness. The witness confirms that the statements and declarations made are true and correct.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel, and the affirmation of Plaintiff's witness, the Court finds that Defendant is in breach.

The Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ziff Davis, LLC and against Defendant Runway Operation LLC as follows:

Damages $1,231,559.14
Interest $11,235.38
Attorney's Fees $22,444.00
Costs $550.00

Proposed Judgment signed by Court and filed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Continued To Nov-29-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
